sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(Decimal(18, 4)));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, toDecimal64OrNull('123.4567', 4)), (2, toDecimal64OrNull('invalid', 4));
UPDATE test_table SET value = toDecimal64OrNull(toString(value + 10), 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, toTypeName(value) AS type FROM test_table FORMAT Vertical;
SELECT id, toDecimal64OrNull(toString(value * 100), 2) AS scaled_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
